diagnostics.message: External Docs MUST Be Defined
Missing `jsonSchemaDialect`.
Missing `webhooks`.
The API contract MUST include a 'security' section at the root level.: "security" property must be truthy
Security field MUST be present at the root of the spec with at least one item (ie.
API must have an unique identifier in x-api-id in #/info/x-api-id.
API MUST have an one-liner #/info/x-summary field containing a brief description.
API MUST reference the URL of the Terms of Service  in #/info/termsOfService.
Info MUST Have Contact Email
All API URLs should follow Cloud URl Structure summary
APIs SHOULD be accessible under api.spscommerce.com.
The "/status" path used to health-check the API must be defined. "paths./status.get.responses[200]" property must be truthy
Path should expose an OPTIONS operation for CORS preflight.
Path must include the version.; /apis incorrect
A resource SHOULD NOT contain 'api' as a prefix in or a part of the path.
Header X-B3-Traceid, X-B3-Spanid or traceparent (w3c) missing
Description for 200 get response must be 'OK'.
Endpoint must be a $ref.; get incorrect
Operation MUST Not Have a Period.
Operation Description MUST Be Less Than 250 Characters
Collection should support a filter query parameter.

Operation should accept an Accept-Encoding header.
Operation should accept an Accept-Language header.
Operation should accept a `baggage` request header.

Operation should accept a `tracestate` request header.
Optional param should have examples

ruleReach.title: Schema String Require Pattern Or Format
Schema String Property Require Max Length
Schema String Property Require Min Length
Schema Array Require Min Max Items
Operation Get Support If Modified Since
Operation Get Support If None Match
Parameter No Hybrid And Root Filtering
Response Must Use JSON Content Type
Schema Array Property Require Max Items
Schema Array Property Require Min Items
Schema Name Property Must Be String
Parameter No API Keys In Query
Schema Description Property Must Be String
Schema ID Property Must Be String
Document Spec Must Not Be Empty
Operation Patch Must Have Request Body
Operation Write Support If Unmodified Since
Parameter Filter Param Only On Get
Parameter No X Prefixed Request Header
Parameter OWASP API1 No Numeric IDs
Parameter Sort Param Only On Get
Path No X Prefixed Response Header
Request Body Must Use JSON Content Type
Request Delete Must Not Have Body
Request Get Must Not Have Body
Request Head Must Not Have Body
Request Options Must Not Have Body
Request Patch Media Type Not Plain JSON
Request Post Collection Require Paging Object
Request Support Form Urlencoded Media Type
Request Support Text Plain Media Type
Response CORS Allow Origin No Wildcard
Response Default Content Language En Us
Response Delete Must Not Return Body
Response Error Schema Problem Property Names
Response Head Must Not Return Body
Response No Operational Header In Spec
Response No Sensitive Data In Header
Response Options Must Not Return Body
Response OWASP API3 Define Error Validation
Response Require Status Health Check Path
Response Status Path Problem Schema Fields
Response Status Path Return Problem Type
Schema Created Datetime Must Be Date Time
Schema Createdby Property Must Be String
Schema Date Time Property Require Format
